title: Vacancy for Category Manager at FabHotels International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Category Manager at FabHotels International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Join the FabHotels International Enterprises family as a Category Manager in Patna. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About FabHotels International Enterprises:
FabHotels International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FabHotels International Enterprises!
